message.content:
@startuml
title Temperature Sensor A internal sequence

participant "Internal Sequence" as IS1
participant "Internal Sequence" as IS2
participant "getSignal" as GS
participant "AD conversion" as ADC
participant "signal processing" as SP

IS1 ..> GS : start
GS ..> ADC : signal
ADC ..> SP : signal
SP ..> ADC : signal
ADC ..> GS : signal
GS ..> IS2 : end

@enduml
